calendar.matters:
TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
ERIK R. HARTSTROM, ESQ., Hartstrom Law (916)-572-6048, erik@hartstromlaw.com Attorney for Petitioners.
JASON CURIANO, ESQ., BUTY & CURLIANO LLP, 510-267-3000, jcurliano@butycurliano.com attorney for Defendant UCSF Benioff Children's Hospital San Francisco
Reporter: Peter Torreano, CSR#7623, 408-371-0464, peter@torreano-depos.com (via Zoom)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF

Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Peter Torreano, CSR#7623, 408-371-0464, peter@torreano-depos.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (In-person)
ERIK R. HARTSTROM, ESQ., Hartstrom Law (916)-572-6048, erik@hartstromlaw.com Attorney for Petitioners.
JASON CURIANO, ESQ., BUTY & CURLIANO LLP, 510-267-3000, jcurliano@butycurliano.com attorney for Defendant UCSF Benioff Children's Hospital San Francisco
Reporter: Peter Torreano, CSR#7623, 408-371-0464, peter@torreanon-depos.com (via Zoom)

3:01pm Hearing is held. Appearances are stated. Petitioners Bill Mendieta (In-person) and Anna Mendieta (Zoom) are present. The Court announces the Court has received more documents. The Court sets a hearing on Petition/TRO re: Injunction on June 26, 2024 at 1:30pm. Petitioner's Reply brief is due on June 24, 2024 at 9:00am. The currrect restraining order remains in effect until June 26, 2024.

The Court allows Mr. Curliano to file another declaration if needed to be submitted at the same time. Parties apprise the Court that a facility may have been found. The Court orders counsel to meet and confer in the hallway.

3:06pm The Court steps off the bench. Counsel meet and confer.

3:36pm The Court takes the bench. Mr. Curliano apprises the Court there are further issues that need to be discussed.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF is continued to June 26, 2024 at 1:30pm. Petitioner's reply is due on June 24, 2024 at 9:00am. The currect restraining order shall remain in effect until June 26, 2024. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Reporter: Peter Torreano, CSR#7623, 408-371-0464, peter@torreanon-depos.com, Reported. (302/rbu)

TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jun-18-24 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
ERIK R. HARTSTROM, ESQ., (916)-572-6048 erik@hartstromlaw.com Attorney for Petitioners
JASON CURIANO, ESQ., BUTY & CURLIANO LLP, 510-267-3000 jcurliano@butycurliano.com attorney for Defendant UCSF Benioff Children's Hospital San Francisco

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

TRO RE: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF is continued to June 18, 2024 at 3:00 p.m. for further hearing. Parties are to meet and confer re: the issue of a transfer to another facility and the issue of medical records. Stay is extended to June 18, 2024. Counsel for respondent to submit a proposed order in compliance with 3.1312 approval as to form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
